name: Plain Oven Scones (Scottish)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pint buttermilk, full cream milk or soured milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F or gas mark 8.
2. Grease and dust a baking sheet.
3. Sift the self-raising flour into a bowl and rub in the butter until crumbly.
4. Add sufficient buttermilk (or milk) to form a moist, spongy dough.
5. Turn out onto a floured surface and knead gently.
6. Roll out to 1/2 inch thickness and cut into rounds using a 2 1/2-inch pastry cutter.
7. Place the scones on the baking sheet. Brush the tops with milk.
8. Bake for 8-10 minutes until risen and light golden in colour.
9. Cool on a wire rack.
10. Serve split open with butter and jam.
For richer scones, add 1 beaten egg to the dry ingredients before adding the buttermilk (or milk). Brush the tops of the scones with beaten egg instead of milk before baking.
